method: jscpd (A0) + 3 read-only semantic agents (A) + personal verification on raw code (B/C)

jscpd.note: token-level near-clean; value is in the semantic layer

findings.name: PowerShell↔Rust: 7 fully-ported scripts orphaned beside Rust twins
findings.shared_task: provider/router/engine/opencode management — each PS+Rust pair does the same job
findings.diverges: implementation language; ONLY Rust executes (no _SCRIPT_REL const, no spawn — all lib.rs refs are /// comments)
findings.maintenance_risk: high (7 misleading dead files in OSS repo)
findings.fix_approach: Owner decision: (a) delete vendored tools/claude-profiles/*.ps1 + move sentinel comment to Rust, or (b) mark DEPRECATED/not-invoked header + document
findings.blast_radius: zero in-app; refs only in CLAUDE.md/docs/README (documentation). External SCRIPTS_ROOT originals out of repo.
findings.verify: grep _SCRIPT_REL in lib.rs shows none of the 7; app builds + provider/router/engine tabs still work via native

findings.name: Absolute-date formatter: bug fix lives in 1 of 4 copies
findings.shared_task: render ISO timestamp as localized absolute date tolerating null/invalid input
findings.diverges: 3 copies use try/catch that never catches Invalid Date (new Date('..._..') doesn't throw) → leaks 'Invalid Date'; BackupTab uses Number.isNaN(getTime()) guard (comment at :55-57 documents the bug)
findings.fix_approach: extract formatAbsTime(ts,{snapshotFallback?}) to relativeTime.ts; migrate 4 sites; keep t('common.dash') empty-return
findings.blast_radius: each local to its component markup; no tests on these fns
findings.verify: feed an unparseable non-throwing timestamp → dash, not 'Invalid Date'; npm run check

findings.name: fmtAgo reimplements canonical relTime (2 byte-identical + HomeTab variant)
findings.diverges: presentation: custom i18n keys (common.*Ago) vs Intl.RelativeTimeFormat; relTime has 'month' bucket
findings.fix_approach: replace both fmtAgo with relTime; keep common.*Ago keys (HomeTab.ageStr uses them) or rewrite ageStr too
findings.blast_radius: fmtAgo called in Profiles/Sync markup; rendering changes to Intl form
findings.verify: Profiles/Sync 'ago' labels render via relTime; npm test (i18n parity)

findings.name: Clipboard copy bypasses centralized clipboard.ts
findings.shared_task: write text to navigator.clipboard in try/catch + flash 'copied'
findings.diverges: inline try/catch; flash timeout 1200ms (SecretInput) vs 1500ms (ForkRepoCard/Console); ForkRepoCard shadows the export name
findings.fix_approach: import copyText in 3 components; add pasteText() for TerminalPane.paste or leave (read-side)
findings.blast_radius: callers set copied from bool return; trivial
findings.verify: copy buttons still flash; npm run check

findings.name: isValidUrl scheme-validation drift between sibling dialogs
findings.shared_task: validate baseUrl string to gate dialog submit
findings.diverges: ProviderEditDialog passes ftp:/mailto:/foo:bar; MyProviderEditDialog rejects non-http(s)
findings.blast_radius: canSubmit in both dialogs; backend valid_base_url (lib.rs:2661) is the real gate
findings.verify: ProviderEditDialog rejects non-http(s) baseUrl; npm run check

findings.name: ~/.claude/plugins loader prologue copy-pasted into 4 fns
findings.shared_task: resolve plugins dir, read installed_plugins.json + known_marketplaces.json, iterate plugins extracting first installPath
findings.diverges: early-return idiom (let-else vs match), return container; first-installPath chain byte-identical (4075-4080==4234-4239)
findings.verify: Plugins tab lists descriptions/skills/updates/contents unchanged; cargo test

findings.name: find-provider-by-id predicate repeated 8x
findings.shared_task: locate provider record with matching id in read_myproviders_raw()
findings.diverges: .find (borrow) vs .position (index); not-found handling (ok_or vs {ok:false} JSON vs tolerant None)
findings.blast_radius: internal; per-call not-found handling stays at call-site

findings.name: Status-envelope readers countOf/durationText duplicated
findings.shared_task: read counts.changed/failed (with legacy fallbacks) + format durationSec as M:SS
findings.diverges: countOf functionally identical; durationText differs only in i18n key (page.out_sec vs updates.durationSeconds) + ComponentCard legacy-duration fallback
findings.fix_approach: extract countOf/durationText to shared module; import in ComponentCard/UpdatesTab; reconcile i18n key choice
findings.blast_radius: outcome.ts clean module; key namespace (page.out_* vs updates.*) needs a decision
findings.verify: ComponentCard health/duration + toasts unchanged; npm test (outcome.test.ts)

findings.name: Provider auth-header block duplicated line-for-line
findings.shared_task: attach x-api-key+anthropic-version (anthropic) or Bearer (openai) to a ureq GET
findings.diverges: none — must-stay-in-sync copy-paste; fetch_engine_models/fetch_profile_usage are weaker always-Bearer relatives
findings.fix_approach: with_provider_auth(req, protocol, key) -> req; call from both
findings.verify: provider probe + balance still authenticate (anthropic + openai); cargo test

findings.name: expand_placeholders == expand_manifest (identical bodies, two names)
findings.shared_task: replace {{SCRIPTS_ROOT}} and {{USERPROFILE}} placeholders in a string
findings.diverges: code: none (byte-identical); only names + doc-comments diverge
findings.fix_approach: delete expand_manifest, replace calls with expand_placeholders (or document intended future divergence)
findings.verify: engine/router/stack paths resolve unchanged; cargo test

findings.name: Factored-once-inlined-N inconsistency (ureq agent; action dispatchers)
findings.shared_task: (a) build ureq agent with timeout; (b) map action to (script,args) then spawn
findings.diverges: one copy factored, rest inline; action arg-tables legitimately differ (only epilogue repeats)
findings.fix_approach: (a) agent_with_timeout(secs) replacing 5 inlines; (b) low ROI — extract only unknown-action+spawn epilogue, keep tables
findings.verify: all provider/engine HTTP calls + tab actions work; cargo test

findings.name: Cluster of trivial copy-pasted one-liners
findings.shared_task: locale-tag; folder basename; json string accessor; status->color; color map; via-label
sites: locale-tag x7: relativeTime.ts:9, ComponentCard:43, ForksTab:106, BackupTab:63, ScheduleTab:29, AnalyticsTab:67, LaunchConfigDialog:80
findings.diverges: mostly none (pure copy-paste, drywall-class); included as DRY leads with obvious homes
findings.target_location: src/lib/relativeTime.ts or src/lib/format.ts; rust fn json_str
findings.fix_approach: localeTag()/basename() helpers; fn json_str(e,k); do alongside F2/F3

findings.name: Structural patterns lacking a shared primitive
findings.shared_task: backup-then-write config; engines.json find-by-id; collapsible/segmented UI
findings.diverges: write primitive (write_file_no_bom vs fs::write); create_dir_all presence; per-surface CSS vocabulary
findings.fix_approach: backend helpers small; UI atoms medium-large (many call sites)
findings.verify: config writes still create .bak; engine list works; UI sections toggle; full check+test
